== Notes for [[Item:Q113000|Q113000]] ==

-http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SPANISH%20NOBILITY%20LATER%20MEDIEVAL.htm#FernandoNunezMMayorRodriguez

b) ''' FERNANDO Núñez '''). Barton names Fronilde Fernández as daughter of Fernando Núñez and Mayor Rodríguez, and niece of Conde Gómez Núñez[3038].

'''m''' MAYOR Rodríguez, daughter of [conde RODRIGO Muñoz & his wife ---]. ... ... ...

Fernando & his wife had one child:
*i) FRONILDE Fernández (-after 10 Feb 1187). ... ... ... '''m''' (before 15 Dec 1155) conde RODRIGO Pérez de Traba "el Velloso", son of PEDRO Fróilaz de Traba & his second wife Mayor [Guntroda] Rodríguez (-after 24 Dec 1165).

-------

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
